title: Ability to apply permission settings on the group level
excerpt: Currently the settings on the board only allow the permissions to be applied acrose the entire board.  We would like the ability to choose the groups they should be applied to or have the ability to apply permissions by …

posts.author: tinasudano1234 (Tina Sudano)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the settings on the board only allow the permissions to be applied acrose the entire board. We would like the ability to choose the groups they should be applied to or have the ability to apply permissions by group.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tina,
If using Monday’s Enterprise feature is an option for you I would suggest looking into Item Permissions as it lets you set permissions at a more granular level…
Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com
